info.title: Meziantou.Framework.NuGetPackageValidation.Tool
info.description: CLI tool to validate NuGet packages follows best-practices

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

options.name: --rules
options.description: Available rules: AssembliesMustBeOptimized, AuthorMustBeSet, DescriptionMustBeSet, IconMustBeSet, LicenseMustBeSet, PackageIdAvailableOnNuGetOrg, ProjectUrlMustBeSet, ReadmeMustBeSet, RepositoryMustBeSet, RepositoryBranchMustBeSet, Symbols, TagsMustBeSet, XmlDocumentationMustBePresent

options.name: --excluded-rules
options.description: Available rules: AssembliesMustBeOptimized, AuthorMustBeSet, DescriptionMustBeSet, IconMustBeSet, LicenseMustBeSet, PackageIdAvailableOnNuGetOrg, ProjectUrlMustBeSet, ReadmeMustBeSet, RepositoryMustBeSet, RepositoryBranchMustBeSet, Symbols, TagsMustBeSet, XmlDocumentationMustBePresent

options.name: --excluded-rule-ids
options.description: List of rule ids to exclude from analysis

options.name: --only-report-errors
options.description: Only report errors on the output [default: False]

arguments.name: package-path
arguments.description: Paths to the NuGet packages to validate
